title: thelycrania iberica
intro: Thelycrania iberica, also known as Spanish valerian or wild valerian, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its sedative effects, which can help alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness. The health benefits of Thelycrania iberica include its ability to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
